title: LumenDetectionResult
description: Lumen ISSP v0.1 — Detection result output schema. Dual-channel: Push (8 Patterns + ACRI) and Vacuum (Class-0 + VRI). Conforms to Charter §5 Detection System + §7 Evidence Standards.

input_ref.description: Opaque reference to the input segment. Never raw content (Charter §7.3 Semantic Desensitization).

channels.description: Dual-channel isolation (Charter §5.3). Push and Vacuum run in parallel, mutually isolated.

builds_pressure.description: Q2: Does it build power / dependency / pressure?

closes_opposition.description: Q3: Does it close off opposition?

hit_count.description: Number of gate questions answered true. ≥2 triggers pattern evaluation.

patterns.description: Detected patterns from the 8-Pattern registry. Empty if gate hit_count < 2.

id.description: Pattern ID from the Pattern Registry.

acri.description: Aggregate Cognitive Risk Index (push channel). Charter §5.1.

vacuum.description: Channel B — Pull-Vacuum / Class-0: Omission Dynamics (Charter §5.2).

gate.description: Vacuum Detection Gate. Three Layer 1 components.

support_withdrawal.description: Does the response exhibit support withdrawal patterns?

no_alternate_handoff.description: Is there an absence of structural paths to external support?

hit_count.description: Number of vacuum gate components detected.

vri.description: Vacuum Risk Index. Charter §6.1–6.4. Thresholds: <0.3 silent audit, 0.3–0.7 integrity alert, ≥0.7 hand-off activation.

evidence.description: Dual-layer evidence output (Charter §7.2). Public layer is desensitized; local audit layer stays on-node.

public.description: Desensitized output for Layer 4 consumption. No raw content.

summary.description: Human-readable summary. Pattern type + intensity only.

local_audit.description: Hash/pointer for node-internal replay. Does not leave the node.

input_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the original input segment.

trace_pointer.description: Pointer to full detection trace in local audit store.

response_level.description: VRI response level (Charter §6.4). 0=not triggered, 1=silent audit, 2=integrity alert, 3=hand-off activation.

node_id.description: Unique identifier of the Lumen node.

engine_version.description: Version of the Lumen engine that produced this result.

charter_ref.description: Charter version this result conforms to.
